title: DatedObligation
description: One thing with a clock. Categorical state only — no numeric confidence/risk scores. Mirrors engine/dated_objects.py. lead_times is an operational reminder cascade (a count of reminders), not a score.

kind.description: Registry key. Extensible; the initial set:

source_object_id.description: The tender/contract/invoice/credential this obligation hangs off.

due_date.description: ISO date, or null when the date is not KNOWN. Never a guessed default.

date_status.description: An unparseable/unknown date is VERIFY_AT_SOURCE, never silently absent.

lead_times.description: Days-before-due reminder cascade; default [90,30,7,1], per-kind and per-obligation overridable.

citation.description: Required (golden_rule) for law-derived kinds; user-entered kinds carry a user_entered citation.

depends_on.description: Ids this obligation depends on. An unresolved dependency makes this BLOCKED.

state.description: Operational state only. Credential legal status (incl. RECERT_PRESUMPTION_PENDING) lives in credential_status, never here.
